title: Citrusy Fluffy White Sauerkraut Stir-fry
description: This citrusy, fluffy white sauerkraut dish is energizing and features a gluten-free-friendly twist for a delicious Jamaican-inspired breakfast option.

ingredients.name: White Sauerkraut
ingredients.notes: Squeeze out excess liquid to avoid watery stir-fry

ingredients.name: Citrus Zest
ingredients.notes: Juice from one lemon and zest from two limes for added zing

ingredients.name: Egg Whites
ingredients.notes: For a fluffier texture and extra protein boost

instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the white sauerkraut, garlic, ginger, and lemon and lime zest. Cook until heated through and slightly crispy, about 5 minutes.
Beat the egg whites in a small bowl until frothy. Pour into the hot sauerkraut mixture and stir gently to combine, allowing it to cook for another minute.
Season with salt and pepper, taste as needed. Add green onions on top if desired.
Serve hot or at room temperature, garnished with extra zest.
